'''Jerrist VI''' was a factory and resource mining world in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]]. It was quarantined by the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] when a plague broke out.

{{Planet-stub}}
